description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized armored human figure standing atop a multi-tiered stone pedestal. The figure is adorned in elaborate, gold-colored armor with sharp, angular details and a helmet, evoking a heroic or mythological character. The pose is dynamic, with one arm extended outward and the other resting on the hip, suggesting confidence or command. The pedestal features engraved lines and a plaque at the front, which reads 'CANCER - MANIGOLDO' and includes additional text and a decorative emblem. The base is constructed to resemble stone steps, adding to the monumentality of the piece. The overall impression is one of strength and grandeur, suitable for a public or commemorative setting.
description: A gold-armored human figure stands heroically on a stone pedestal with engraved details and a front-facing plaque. The sculpture exudes strength and mythological grandeur.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full armored figure, the extended arm, and the detailed plaque on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the outstretched arm and the layered structure of the pedestal steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the armor and the stepped stone base without the plaque visible.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the figure's profile, the hand gesture, and the side of the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: armored human figure on a stone pedestal
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is presented on a stone pedestal, suggesting an outdoor public space or commemorative plaza.
